coffee_chat.subject: Undergraduate interested in your research
coffee_chat.body:
Dear Professor Marino,

My name is Maya Patel, and I am a junior majoring in Computer Science at the University of Utah. I am looking for undergraduate research experience in machine learning and language models for healthcare and clinical text. I was especially interested in your work because your profile highlights computer vision and natural language processing. A concrete example of this interest for me is CS 5350 final project on text classification for medical notes. Would you be open to a short conversation about your research and how an undergraduate might get involved? My current background includes Python, PyTorch, scikit-learn, and I would be excited to contribute while continuing to learn.

Thank you for your time,
Maya Patel
